content.en:
The half-step Legendary Realm Lord who broke through this time was the Lord of the Dust Realm, second only to the Lord of Baiheng at the beginning, and a little more powerful than the Lord of Frostless, and it was the second half-step Legendary Realm of the True Saintless Land, and now the Lord of the First Half-Step Legendary Realm.

Even if he had the Bridge of Time and could enter the Long River of Time to cultivate, he was still a little short from beginning to end, but now he finally stepped into that last step with the help of the three thousand kites.

"We really have another Legendary Realm Lord in the Holy Land!"

Lord Longgu said happily.

The Lord of the Dust Realm has controlled time, and he can impact the realm of the Lord of the Legendary Realm at any time, and the Lord of the Dust Realm itself is infinitely close to controlling time, and now that he has broken through, it will not arouse the suspicion of the outside world.

So this day comes.

The Lord of the Dust Realm, under the protection of several Legendary Realm Lords, entered the long river of time "One Five Three" to break through.

Everything went very smoothly, no other Legendary Realm Lord came to trouble the Dust Realm Lord, and the Dust Realm Lord successfully broke through to the Legendary Realm Lord Realm.

Subsequently.

The other Legendary Realm Lords of the True Void Holy Land were also working hard to comprehend, and if they broke through to the peak Legendary Realm Lord Realm, then the True Void Realm would instantly become the top force of the many Eternal Seas in the Void Region, not just the top forces of the Infinite Sea.

A peak Legendary Realm lord, as long as he doesn't offend those incomparably terrifying Peak Legendary Realm Lords, almost all of them are invincible existences, and he can naturally bless a top force by crushing ordinary Legendary Realm lords with his hands.

At that time, even if the three thousand iris were exposed in the True Saintless Land, no one would dare to snatch it.

It's a pity that it's too difficult to become a peak Legendary Realm Lord, and the Black Water Lord's talent is also very good, occupying three thousand iris for a long time, but there is no way to break through to the Peak Legendary Realm Lord realm with the help of it, which shows how difficult it is to become a peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Over the long years, Ye Tian has made great progress.

He continued to fuse his body and the will rule heaven and earth, the speed of fusion was very fast, and his strength was getting stronger and stronger, at this speed, it would not be too long for him to completely fuse his body with the will rule heaven and earth.

At that time, he will be a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, and he will be able to attack the Legendary Realm Lord Realm.

this day.

Ye Tian has made a breakthrough in the supreme technique, he has created the third time supreme technique, this time it is the speed class time supreme technique, although he doesn't need it much, but once he fights with the lord of the legendary realm in the future, there will be some problems with the wishful void Tiansuo, which is not as good as the speed class time supreme skill.

For the half-step Legendary Realm Lord, once Ye Tian casts the Time Escape, he is almost invincible, no matter how powerful the half-step Legendary Realm Lord is, he can't catch up with him, nor can he keep up with his footsteps and figure, if the defense is poor, he will definitely be consumed by Ye Tian.

It can be said that in addition to the Legendary Realm Lords, Ye Tian is now not afraid of any half-step Legendary Realm Lords, and even if he can fight with a group of half-step Legendary Realm Lords, he can slowly defeat them.

"Time dripping, time barrier, time escape, before I know it, I have also mastered the three time supreme skills!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Among the lords of the Legendary Realm, there are only a few who have mastered the three supreme skills, because it is too difficult to create supreme skills.

And he is different, he has a legendary-level time ancestral endowment, so he can have such a terrifying speed of comprehension and perception in time, so that he can quickly create a time supreme technique.

"Strive to master the fourth supreme skill when you become a half-step Legendary Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he continued to work hard to cultivate enlightenment.

On the other hand, the Lord of the Evil Star was unwilling to find the murderer, and after thinking about it, there was only one way, and that was to seek the help of the Border Lord.

The Frontier Lord is his master's master, even if the Frontier Lord left after saving him last time, and he doesn't want to have anything to do with him anymore.

However, the relationship cannot be completely erased, and if he asks the border lord, he can still ask the border lord for help.

He doesn't need the Border Lord to make a move, he just needs the Border Lord to find out who killed his descendant, the Shattered Star Lord, that's all.

So, the Star Lord began to look for the Frontier Lord.

The border lord is difficult to find, so it is not easy to find him.

However, the Star Lord continued to search, from the Immeasurable Sea to other Eternal Seas, and even to the Frontier Lord's hometown to find 0........ ，

Maybe it was his persistence that finally this day, he found the border lord, or rather, the border lord let him find it.

"Lord Trickster, what are you looking for me, if you ask me to help you get revenge, it is impossible. I will not get involved in your disputes, I will not care about anything. The Frontier Lord said.

The Tricky Star Lord hurriedly bent down and asked: "Border Lord, I don't want you to help me take revenge, it's just that my descendant was killed by a Transcendental Realm Lord who can control time. But I couldn't get a glimpse of his past, nor could I find out his identity, so I asked the border lord to help me find out who my enemies were. "

The Frontier Lord was silent for a long time, but still said, "Okay, I'll help you, but from today onwards, you won't come to me again, and there will be no causal connection between us at all, understand?"

"Understood!"

The Star Lord nodded.

"Take me to the place where your descendants have fallen, and I'll see. "

Frontier Lord's Road.

"Yes!"

The Star Lord led the way, and soon came to the void area where the Star Lord had fallen.

"This is it!"

0.9 Star Lord's Road.

"I'll see!"

The border lord looked through time, spied on the past scenes, and quickly locked on the curtain where the Shattered Star Lord was killed, and also stared at the replica body that Ye Tian disguised.

Rumble!!!!!

The border lord began to snoop, and the power of time and space penetrated, but he still couldn't spy on Ye Tian's past.

"Strange!"

The Frontier Lord frowned.

He could only see what had happened in the past, but he couldn't get a glimpse of Ye Tian's past.

"Go to the ruins of the Trick Star Tower. "

Frontier Lord's Road.

"Yes!"

The Star Lord replied.

But he's a little worried, he won't even be able to find the murderer in the border lords, right?

No, you should be able to find it, this is the Peak Legendary Realm Lord!_

16. To see the ununderlined version of the novel, please download the Flying Novel APP!
